items.title: Iranians form human chains at bridges and power plants
items.dek: Tehran had urged people to gather outside potential US and Israeli targets after Donald Trump threatened to attack civilian infrastructure.

items.title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
items.dek: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.
